title: [InstCombine] Do not fold `shufflevector(select)` if the select condition is a vector

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary examples all use constant vector operands in the select instruction. This test uses variable operands (%v1, %v2) which represents a more general case not covered by the specific examples.

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x i32> @shuf_vec_select_nonconst_operands(<4 x i1> %cond, <4 x i32> %v1, <4 x i32> %v2) {
#0:
  %sel = select <4 x i1> %cond, <4 x i32> %v1, <4 x i32> %v2
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x i32> %sel, <4 x i32> { 100, 101, 102, 103 }, 0, 1, 2, 3
  ret <4 x i32> %shuf
}
=>
define <4 x i32> @shuf_vec_select_nonconst_operands(<4 x i1> %cond, <4 x i32> %v1, <4 x i32> %v2) {
#0:
  %sel = select <4 x i1> %cond, <4 x i32> %v1, <4 x i32> %v2
  ret <4 x i32> %sel
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on i1 conditions specifically, but patch uses isIntegerTy() which accepts any scalar integer type including i8 after icmp conversion

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define <2 x i32> @shuf_select_scalar_i8_condition(i8 %c) {
  %cond.not = icmp eq i8 %c, 0
  %shuf = select i1 %cond.not, <2 x i32> <i32 40, i32 30>, <2 x i32> <i32 20, i32 10>
  ret <2 x i32> %shuf
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <2 x i32> @shuf_select_scalar_i8_condition(i8 %c) {
#0:
  %cond = icmp ne i8 %c, 0
  %sel = select i1 %cond, <2 x i32> { 10, 20 }, <2 x i32> { 30, 40 }
  %shuf = shufflevector <2 x i32> %sel, <2 x i32> poison, 1, 0
  ret <2 x i32> %shuf
}
=>
define <2 x i32> @shuf_select_scalar_i8_condition(i8 %c) {
#0:
  %cond.not = icmp eq i8 %c, 0
  %shuf = select i1 %cond.not, <2 x i32> { 40, 30 }, <2 x i32> { 20, 10 }
  ret <2 x i32> %shuf
}
Transformation seems to be correct!

Summary:
  1 correct transformations
  0 incorrect transformations
  0 failed-to-prove transformations
  0 Alive2 errors

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary emphasizes i1 but patch accepts any scalar integer condition type; i32 condition with wider vector (4 elements) and reverse shuffle not explicitly covered

alive2.tgt:
; ModuleID = '<stdin>'
source_filename = "<stdin>"

define <4 x float> @shuf_select_scalar_i32_condition_wide(i32 %c) {
  %cond = icmp sgt i32 %c, 5
  %shuf = select i1 %cond, <4 x float> <float 4.000000e+00, float 3.000000e+00, float 2.000000e+00, float 1.000000e+00>, <4 x float> <float 8.000000e+00, float 7.000000e+00, float 6.000000e+00, float 5.000000e+00>
  ret <4 x float> %shuf
}
alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define <4 x float> @shuf_select_scalar_i32_condition_wide(i32 %c) {
#0:
  %cond = icmp sgt i32 %c, 5
  %sel = select i1 %cond, <4 x float> { 1.000000, 2.000000, 3.000000, 4.000000 }, <4 x float> { 5.000000, 6.000000, 7.000000, 8.000000 }
  %shuf = shufflevector <4 x float> %sel, <4 x float> poison, 3, 2, 1, 0
  ret <4 x float> %shuf
}
=>
define <4 x float> @shuf_select_scalar_i32_condition_wide(i32 %c) {
#0:
  %cond = icmp sgt i32 %c, 5
  %shuf = select i1 %cond, <4 x float> { 4.000000, 3.000000, 2.000000, 1.000000 }, <4 x float> { 8.000000, 7.000000, 6.000000, 5.000000 }
  ret <4 x float> %shuf
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
